narrative:
Precinct South Webster Village (precinct in Scioto County) has 471 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.4 percentage points.
